issues.description: FlipLife action is missing the conditional check. The effect should only flip 1 life card, then conditionally grant Rush only if life cards ≤ 2. Current DSL applies FlipLife unconditionally.
GiveKeyword (Rush) is missing condition HasLifeCardsLessOrEqual:2. Rush should only be granted if the character has 2 or fewer Life cards after the flip.
Duration is EndOfTurn but text says 'during this turn' which is equivalent. This is acceptable but DuringYourTurn would be more precise for Rush mechanics.
